'''Iri''' was a forested [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Epidimi system/Legends|Epidimi system]] located in the mid-rim, discovered in [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], which crossbred its native avians with the similar avians of [[Disim]], resulting in the [[Tarong]]s, who drove their mother [[Species/Legends|species]] on both worlds extinct.
